news.paragraph: Micron is currently a focal point in the semiconductor space as the AI trade continues to be driven by what is described as insatiable demand. Although the broader tech sector has recently seen some retreats from record highs, the company remains a key mover linked to the ongoing artificial intelligence build-out. Options traders should weigh this sector-wide volatility against the strong demand narrative surrounding AI chipmakers.
headlines: Dow Jones Futures: AI Stocks Pare Big Losses; How To Handle Sandisk, Micron, Intel
